tests.title: Verify first token delivery time under normal network conditions
preconditions: User is logged into the chat interface
Network RTT is confirmed to be less than 100ms
steps: Open the network monitoring tool to track packet transmission
Send a message in the chat
Measure the time elapsed from the message send action until the first token of the AI response appears
tests.expected_result: The first token of the AI response appears within 10 seconds of the message being sent.

tests.title: Verify response time SLA across multiple chat entry points
preconditions: User has access to web, mobile, and embedded widget chat entry points
steps: Access the chat via the web interface and send a message
Access the chat via the mobile interface and send a message
Access the chat via the embedded widget and send a message
tests.expected_result: The first token of the AI response appears within 10 seconds for all three entry points.

tests.title: Verify system behavior when network latency exceeds normal conditions
preconditions: User is in a chat session
Network RTT is simulated to be significantly higher than 100ms
steps: Throttle the network connection to simulate high latency
Send a message in the chat
tests.expected_result: The system fails to deliver the first token within 10 seconds and displays the timeout message with a retry option.

tests.title: Verify P95 latency compliance in production monitoring
preconditions: Sufficient volume of chat traffic has occurred
steps: Navigate to the production monitoring dashboard
Filter the latency metrics for the chat service
Review the P95 end-to-end response latency metric
tests.expected_result: The P95 end-to-end response latency value is 10 seconds or less.

tests.title: Verify system recovery after timeout using retry option
preconditions: User has received a timeout message due to a previous slow response
steps: Observe the timeout message on the chat screen
Click the retry option provided in the timeout message
tests.expected_result: The chat system re-sends the message and attempts to generate a new response.
